6:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Structure"}]
7:["$","$L1f",null,{"chart":"\ngraph LR\n  A[Alice] -->|prefers_language| B[Go]\n  A -->|works_on| C[Project Alpha]\n  C -->|has_deadline| D[2026-05-01]\n  C -->|depends_on| E[Auth Service]\n  E -->|maintained_by| F[Bob]\n"}]
8:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Temporal Dimensions"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"Every edge has temporal metadata:"}]
a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]}],": When the relationship became true"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]}],": When it ceased being true (NULL = current)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"confidence"}]}],": How certain we are about this fact"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]}],": Which memory entry this was extracted from"]}],"\n"]}]
b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Query Patterns"}]
c:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Direct Neighbors"}]
d:["$","$L20",null,{"code":"# Who works on Project Alpha?\nmem.query_facts(predicate=\"works_on\", object=\"Project Alpha\")\n# > Alice\n","language":"python"}]
e:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Path Traversal"}]
f:["$","$L20",null,{"code":"# What services does Project Alpha depend on (2 hops)?\nmem.traverse(subject=\"Project Alpha\", depth=2)\n# > Auth Service > Bob (maintainer)\n","language":"python"}]
10:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Temporal Filtering"}]
11:["$","$L20",null,{"code":"# What were Alice's preferences as of March 1?\nmem.query_facts(\n  subject=\"Alice\",\n  predicate=\"prefers_language\",\n  at_time=\"2026-03-01\",\n)\n","language":"python"}]
12:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Statistics"}]
13:["$","$L20",null,{"code":"stats = mem.graph_stats()\nprint(f\"Entities: {stats.entity_count}\")\nprint(f\"Relationships: {stats.edge_count}\")\nprint(f\"Predicates: {stats.predicate_count}\")\nprint(f\"Coverage: {stats.temporal_coverage}\")\n","language":"python"}]
14:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Implementation"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":"The graph is stored in SQLite with:"}]
16:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Nodes table"}],": Entity lookup and deduplication"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Edges table"}],": Triples with temporal validity"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Indices"}],": Subject, predicate, object, and time-range indexes"]}],"\n"]}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":"No external graph database required."}]
18:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L21",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Performance Tip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Graph queries are fast for shallow traversals (1–3 hops). Deep traversals (5+ hops) may require optimization. Consider materializing common paths if your use case requires deep graph walks."}]}]]}]]}]}]
